reasoning: Based on NASA's official statement on May 22, 2025 that they "anticipate additional countries will sign in the coming weeks and months," combined with demonstrated momentum from three recent signings (Finland in January, Bangladesh on April 8, Norway on May 15), active recruitment efforts targeting emerging space nations, and an international workshop held May 21-22, 2025 to advance implementation, the probability is elevated above base rate. The phrase "weeks and months" from May 22 specifically includes June 2025. However, some uncertainty remains as the statement doesn't guarantee any specific timeframe or countries.
